profile.name: Anjana Kumari
profile.title: Backend Software Engineer
profile.summary: I build reliable backend services, enterprise APIs, microservices, and workflow-driven platforms using Node.js, TypeScript, MongoDB, Redis, and modern integration patterns.
about: I am a backend-focused software engineer with experience developing enterprise healthcare systems, REST APIs, distributed workflows, database-intensive services, and integrations with internal and external platforms.

My work combines practical software architecture with careful attention to data integrity, performance, transaction safety, maintainability, and real-world business requirements. I enjoy turning complex operational processes into clear, dependable software.

I am currently interested in remote backend software engineering roles where I can contribute to meaningful products, collaborate with international teams, and continue improving my system design and cloud engineering skills.

achievements: Designed and maintained Node.js and TypeScript services supporting clinical, medication, admission, and encounter workflows.
Implemented complex MongoDB queries, transaction-safe updates, synchronization processes, and performance improvements.
Integrated AI-assisted clinical documentation and medication-safety features with structured validation and safety controls.
Led technical discussions, code reviews, troubleshooting, and delivery coordination across backend and frontend teams.
Built REST APIs, background services, and database integrations for production systems.
Worked with Node.js, JavaScript, MongoDB, relational databases, Git, and CI/CD workflows.
Investigated production defects and translated business requirements into maintainable software features.

projects.title: Clinical Workflow Engine
projects.description: A configurable workflow service for multi-step clinical procedures, including step completion, editing, status transitions, transaction management, and integration with patient encounters.

projects.title: Medication Safety Screening
projects.description: A backend service that evaluates prescribed and current medications against allergies and interaction risks, then stores structured conflict results for clinical review.

projects.title: Patient and Admission Synchronization
projects.description: A resilient synchronization workflow that creates or updates patient, admission, and encounter data while preserving consistency across multiple business identifiers and systems.

projects.title: Clinical Documentation Services
projects.description: Services for structured SOAP notes, discharge summaries, SBAR handovers, attachments, letters, and clinical templates with role-based validation and audit-friendly data handling.

publications.title: Consumer and Farmer Centric Subscription Based Organic Vegetable/Fruit Delivery System
